Discover More
Our Story

Crafting Memorable Flavors and Gatherings

New Chatapata Cafe Chandauli was born out of a passion for incredible culinary experiences and welcoming community atmospheres. Nestled in Danpur, Chandauli, we are dedicated to providing our visitors with a luxury cafe theme that merges modern aesthetics with warm hospitality.

Whether you are looking for a cozy corner to connect with friends over dynamic beverages, searching for a delicious fast-food escape, or planning a birthday party in a beautifully decorated setting, we cater to every milestone. Our family-friendly atmosphere ensures that every meal feels like a celebration.

Premium Ambience

Stunning dark-green & gold theme setup.

Family Friendly

Dedicated spacious seats for comfort.

Birthday Celebrations

Special decorations and custom menu packs.

Friends Gathering

Cozy corners & awesome snack selections.

Popular Dishes

Taste Our Handcrafted Delicacies

From spicy snacks to premium beverages and combos, discover flavors that ignite your senses.

Excellence Guaranteed

Why Choose New Chatapata Cafe?

We place quality, cleanliness, and guest satisfaction above all else to deliver a worth-remembering cafe experience.

100% Hygienic Food

Our kitchen follows strict safety protocols. Every ingredient is carefully washed, handled, and cooked freshly to maintain taste and purity.

Premium Ambience

Designed with custom dark-green shades and brushed luxury gold details. Our setting offers dynamic mood lighting perfect for instagrammable photos.

Family Seating

We feature a cozy, comfortable, and respectful family zone, assuring complete privacy and pleasant moments with children and parents.

Birthday Decoration

Let us handle your party setups! We offer customizable themes, balloon drop lights, photobooths, and sound setups for awesome events.

Affordable Prices

Luxury does not have to be expensive. Our diverse menu options are reasonably priced to bring premium tastes to everyone in Chandauli.

Friendly Service

Our cordial, dedicated staff welcomes you with a warm smile, attending to your dining needs promptly for a perfect experience.

Guest Testimonials

What Our Customers Say

Verified reviews from food lovers in Chandauli who visit us for ambience and flavors.

“
AS

Abhishek Singh

Google Verified Reviewer

★★★★★

"The best cafe in Chandauli, hands down! The dark green and gold interiors look extremely premium. We ordered the Gourmet Veg Cheese Burger and Kurkure Momos. The taste was absolutely authentic and prices were highly affordable. Perfect place for couples and families!"

“
PK

Priya Kumari

Local Guide

★★★★★

"Booked this cafe for my brother's birthday party. The balloon decoration done by their team was spectacular! The Chinese starter combo platter was a huge hit among the guests. Extremely supportive staff and clean washrooms. 10/10 recommended."

“
MY

Mohd. Yasir

Food Blogger

★★★★★

"I highly recommend their Mint Mojito. It is incredibly refreshing and crafted beautifully. The spacing between tables provides nice privacy. The ambient music complements the luxurious design of the cafe. Prices are very pocket-friendly too."
